probe = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_DIRECT_DISPATCH_PROBE2.md')

    status = 'DIRECT_DISPATCH_ATTEMPTED'
elif 'DIRECT_DISPATCH_HELPER_FAILED' in text:
    status = 'DIRECT_DISPATCH_HELPER_FAILED'
else:
    status = 'UNKNOWN'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_DIRECT_PROBE2_STATUS_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-867 direct probe2 status\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nProbe text:\n' + text[:1000] + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('BEM867 direct probe2 status: ' + status)
